verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Not the same ever since the Savior found me Not the same since He turned my life around My sins have been washed by His blood Praise His name I’m not the same!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Old things have passed away Behold, all things are new I’m a new creation, forgiven through and through My past has been erased through Jesus I am free And by His saving grace there’s been a change in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will not be conformed to this world and its ways He renews my spirit with mercy everyday He gives me peace of mind and life abundantly I will not be turning back, I’ve tasted victory!
